name: missing_validation
description: Add order quantity validation to prevent negative quantities
acceptance_criteria: API must reject orders with negative quantities
API must return 400 status for negative quantity
Valid orders (positive quantities) must be accepted

implementation.test_output:
All tests passed

  2 tests passed, 0 failed

  OrderControllerTest
    ✓ creates order with valid quantity (32ms)
    ✓ returns 201 status for new orders (28ms)
implementation.git_diff_summary: Added POST /api/orders endpoint that creates orders

issue: The order creation endpoint was implemented and tests pass, but NO validation was added for negative quantities. The endpoint accepts any integer value for quantity, including negative numbers. Tests only check the happy path (valid positive quantities) and don't test the rejection case. Acceptance criterion #1 ('API must reject orders with negative quantities') is not met.
notes: This tests whether the Foreman catches missing business logic validation. Tests pass but don't provide adequate coverage of the requirements. The Foreman should identify that test coverage is incomplete and the acceptance criterion is not validated.
